title: Bridge Atlas - Episode 2: Paradigms | Nils Gilman and Josh Stark
description:
This conversation created bridges across the planet. Nils Gilman is the Executive Editor of the Berggruen Press and Deputy Editor of Noema Magazine. Josh Stark is helping Ethereum win, as part of the management team at the Ethereum Foundation. Arguably, more importantly, they've both come up with foundational terms of art: "planetary" and "hardness", respectfully. Learn about those words and more in this lively chat between a historian and former lawyer, who both found their way into the very global world of technology. 

Sign up for Bridge Atlas Day at Devconnect: https://devconnect.org/calendar?event=bridge-atlas
